diagrams.title: RGB Color Cube
diagrams.description: 3D representation of RGB color space showing how colors are formed by combining R, G, B values
diagrams.purpose: Understanding additive color mixing and color coordinates in 3D space

diagrams.title: Animation Keyframe Timeline
diagrams.description: Timeline showing keyframes at positions 0, 30, 60 with tweened frames in between
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how animation software generates intermediate frames between key poses

diagrams.title: Pixel Color Representation
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how a single pixel stores color information in memory
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how color data is stored and accessed in computer memory
